stemHtml: Which statement is correct with respect to selections on the transponder control panel?

options.a: With the selector knobs the four digits of the squawk can be selected using the decimal symbols 0 through 9.
options.b: The correct ICAO 24 bits aircraft address code must be inserted on the control panel.
options.c: With ON selected a reply in the modes A, C and S can be transmitted.
options.d: With ALT selected a reply in the modes A, C and S can be transmitted.
